articles.title: Open USD poses biggest threat yet to Circle's USDC, CoinShares says
articles.description: The consortium-backed stablecoin would share reserve income with partners instead of the issuer, pressuring Circle's margins if it debuts in 2026.

articles.title: Is Robinhood Chain’s success bullish or bearish for ETH the asset?
articles.description: Surging volumes on Robinhood Chain could be very good for Ethereum, but only if the “ETH is money” crowd turn out to be right.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: A timeline of the Ethereum Foundation's ongoing shakeup
articles.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we’re unpacking the timeline of all the changes at the Ethereum Foundation this year.

articles.title: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not models
articles.description: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.

articles.title: Crypto firms face AML risks during post-MiCA migration, says AMLA chair
articles.description: AMLA is expanding its crypto oversight as firms complete the transition to the EU’s MiCA licensing regime.

articles.title: Reelful’s AI turns your camera roll into short-form videos for social media
articles.description: The app is designed for people who want to create social content, but find traditional video editing tools too complex or time-consuming.

articles.title: BlackRock's crypto assets fall 39% despite $15 billion of net inflows
articles.description: BlackRock's digital asset funds attracted $15 billion in net inflows over the past year, but falling crypto prices drove the value of those holdings sharply lower.

articles.title: The launchpad that fueled Robinhood Chain's memecoin boom just gave away all its revenue
articles.description: Noxa, the launchpad behind CASHCAT's rise, racked up nearly $12 million in fees before going dark, giving away its revenue, and leaving Robinhood Chain's memecoin economy in freefall.

articles.title: Japan reclassifies crypto as a financial asset, paves way for tax cuts
articles.description: Lawmakers said crypto has outgrown its role as a payment method and requires rules designed for investment products.

articles.title: Strategy feels 'very secure' until bitcoin reaches $8,000-$10,000, says CEO
articles.description: Le highlighted increasing the U.S.-dollar reserve as an important lever in preferred stock STRC’s recovery back to around $90 having fallen below $75 last month.

articles.title: Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes a unicorn with $130M Series C
articles.description: The startup has reached a $120 million annualized revenue run rate and more than 200,000 paying customers.

articles.title: Vint Cerf is working on a plan to unleash AI agents on the open internet
articles.description: The guy behind TCP/IP is working on a standard for identifying AI agents in the wild.

articles.title: Bitcoin rally cools as investors digest inflation data, oil clouds outlook
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for July 15, 2026

articles.title: Crypto steadies as Middle East tensions counter U.S. inflation report boost
articles.description: Bitcoin held steady at a three-week high as rising tensions between the U.S. and Iran reined in gains from Tuesday's softer-than-expected inflation numbers.

articles.title: Japan passes crypto overhaul to bring digital assets under financial rules
articles.description: Japan’s revised Financial Instruments and Exchange Act introduces crypto insider trading rules, tougher penalties and new oversight requirements for crypto businesses.

articles.title: Backed by $60M in funding, Oak steps out of stealth to fix the identity mess that AI agents are making worse
articles.description: Co-founded by serial entrepreneur Shai Morag, Israeli identity management startup Oak is emerging out of stealth with $60 million in seed funding.

articles.title: South Korea to bring digital assets under new state asset management system
articles.description: South Korea’s Economy Ministry plans to include digital assets and intellectual property under the country’s new state-asset management framework.

articles.title: Stripe mounts blockbuster $53 billion bid to buy PayPal
articles.description: The bid, made together with Advent, follows an earlier expression of interest. PayPal has been reluctant to engage with the offer thus far.
